title: Grilled Salmon Skewers with Molasses Glaze
description: Sweet and savory salmon skewers grilled to perfection, served with a sticky molasses glaze. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner or outdoor BBQ.
instructions: 1. Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F.
2. Cut salmon into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together molasses, maple syrup, and a pinch of salt.
4. Brush the molasses glaze onto the salmon skewers.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Serve hot, garnished with diced apricots.
